name: ASC Denial Review
description: Denial triage, evidence assembly, and routing for ASC denial work.

stages.label: Triage
stages.description: Confirm denial reason and gather cited evidence.

stages.label: Evidence
stages.description: Collect documentation and payer policy support.

name: ASC AR Follow-Up
description: A/R aging, claim status validation, and payer follow-up orchestration.

stages.label: Review
stages.description: Review account status, aging, and prior touches.

stages.label: Escalation
stages.description: Escalate unresolved work based on value and timing.

name: ASC Authorization
description: Authorization readiness, remediation, and retro-review workflow.

stages.label: Verification
stages.description: Validate authorization status and payer requirements.

stages.label: Remediation
stages.description: Repair missing, expired, or mismatched authorization details.

stages.label: Handoff
stages.description: Return the case to downstream workflow with evidence.

name: ASC Charge Capture
description: Charge integrity, implant capture, and missing revenue workflow.

stages.label: Validation
stages.description: Validate documentation against the charge record.

stages.label: Correction
stages.description: Add or correct charge detail with human approval.

stages.label: Release
stages.description: Return corrected work to downstream billing flow.

name: ASC Coding Review
description: Pre-bill and post-bill coding review for ASC specialty work.
